title: onosma sahandica
intro: Onosma sahandica is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as a type of milkwort or golden ragwort. It is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Onosma sahandica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential in treating cancer and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
